g.text: TCP Reliable Delivery & Flow Control Implementation
Memory Layout: Sender Sliding Window Buffer

g.title: Stores segments until ACKed or timed out

div.p: cwnd < ssthresh Exponential growth: cwnd += 1 per ACK
cwnd >= ssthresh Linear growth: cwnd += 1/cwnd per ACK

g.text: Karn's Rule: Retransmissions MUST NOT be used for RTT sampling

g.title: Stores segments until ACKed or timed out
